# KarpView — BenchmarkAnalyze_LargeCluster golden baseline
#
# Recorded against: commit on main where DefaultFixtureConfig.Seed=42
# Scale: 500 nodes / 50 PDBs / 10,000 pods (20 pods/node)
# Command: go test -bench=BenchmarkAnalyze -benchmem -count=5 ./internal/analyzer/
# Go version: go1.25
# Platform: linux/amd64 (GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest)
#
# IMPORTANT: Do not edit this file manually.
# Update only by running `make bench-update` on the main branch after an
# intentional performance improvement has been merged and verified.
# See docs/performance-regression-testing.md for the update procedure.
#
# Post-optimization baselines (from .performance-optimization/05-backend.md):
#   Analyze time:  ~10.63 ms/op
#   Memory:        ~2,197,661 B/op
#   Allocs:        ~6,062 allocs/op
#
